description: PR4 scenario #3 — lab-predicate boundary fixture. A meeting with duration == 80 (inclusive) exposes off-by-one between planner (>80 strict), oracle (>80 strict), and export (>80 strict). The unified helper meeting_requires_lab_room() must classify this meeting identically across all three call-sites. Fixture constructs a single-meeting section with a 08:00–09:20 slot (80 min exactly) and one lab room + one lecture room — if the three sites disagree, placement lands in different rooms across re-runs.
notes: Commit 6 turns this green by routing planner/oracle/export through meeting_requires_lab_room().
Duration 80 is the boundary: >80 excludes it, >=80 includes it. Helper uses >= 80 per the oracle's original intent.
